creator: artur.zabronski@gmail.com
text:
I have set debug.psm.loglevel=4 in loader and boot kernel with
hw.psm.synaptics_support set to 0 and 1.

I think that "psm0: lost interrupt?" messages it's not a problem but
this:
psmintr: delay too long; resetting byte count
psmintr: 00 00 90 8a 08 c0
psmintr: out of sync (0000 != 0080) 210 cmds since last error.
psmintr: discard a byte (1)
psmintr: 00 90 8a 08 c0 57
psmintr: out of sync (0000 != 0080) 0 cmds since last error.
psmintr: discard a byte (2)
